description_long: This is a green bottle with a cylindrical body and a long, narrow neck that tapers slightly before flaring out at the top. The bottle appears to be wrapped or covered in a textured, fabric-like material, giving it a matte and somewhat rough appearance. Around the midsection, there is a rectangular label featuring a vivid image of a red electric guitar with a white pickguard and brown neck, set against a white background. The label is only partially visible from certain angles, wrapping around a portion of the bottle's circumference. The cap is integrated into the neck and appears to be of the same material and color as the rest of the bottle, with no visible separation or mechanism. There are no visible signs of branding, text, or other decorative elements aside from the guitar image. The bottle's overall form and proportions suggest it is designed to hold liquids, but the opacity of the material makes it impossible to see the interior.
description: A green, fabric-textured bottle with a long neck and a label featuring a red electric guitar. The bottle is opaque and has a matte, rough finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's green, textured surface with the label mostly obscured.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the edge of the rectangular label and a partial glimpse of the guitar image.
description_view_2: This view displays the red electric guitar image on the label most clearly, wrapping around the bottle's midsection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other edge of the label and the continuation of the guitar image.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular label with a red electric guitar image, white background, and brown guitar neck; no visible text or branding.
